positive: A detailed, symmetrical, mystical woodland scene print. The central subject is a group of stylized, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna (mushrooms, delicate ferns, gentle woodland sprites). The composition must be perfectly centered and isolated on a solid background. Use a strong silhouette aesthetic with deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and vibrant glowing teal accents. Lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, simulating moonlight filtering through a dense forest canopy. High contrast, vector-graphic quality, ornate details, perfect for t-shirt printing, intricate line work.
negative: blurry, grainy, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, noisy, artifacts, extra limbs, disfigured, bad anatomy, cartoon, photorealistic, ugly, messy, poor contrast
